contestName: ICPC 武汉全国邀请赛暨湖北省赛

blocks.text: Snakebite is a powerful card in *Slay the Spire 2*. The game lasts $10^{1000}$ turns, and the enemy initially has $0$ poison layers.
Yuki has $n$ Snakebite cards. Card $i$ is played at the start of turn $t_i$ and adds $v_i$ poison layers.
At the end of each turn, let $x$ be the current poison layers:

items: If $x\ne0$, the enemy takes $x$ damage and then $x\leftarrow x-1$.

blocks.text: Before the game, Yuki performs exactly $k$ enchantments. Each enchantment chooses any $i$ with $1 \le i \le n$ and increases $v_i$ by $1$; the same card may be chosen repeatedly. Find the maximum total damage.
The first line contains the number of test cases $T$ ($1 \le T \le 10^4$). For each test case:

items: The first line contains $n,k$ ($1 \le n \le 3\times10^5$, $0 \le k \le 10^9$).
The second line contains $v_1,v_2,\ldots,v_n$ with $1 \le v_i \le 10^9$ and $1 \le \sum v_i \le 10^9$.

blocks.text: The sum of $n$ over all test cases does not exceed $3\times10^5$.
For each test case, output the maximum total damage after exactly $k$ enchantments.
“蛇咬”是《杀戮尖塔 2》中的强力卡牌。游戏持续 $10^{1000}$ 个回合，敌人初始有 $0$ 层毒。
Yuki 有 $n$ 张“蛇咬”。第 $i$ 张会在第 $t_i$ 个回合开始时打出，使敌人的毒层数增加 $v_i$。
每个回合结束时，设敌人的当前毒层数为 $x$：

items: 若 $x\ne0$，敌人受到 $x$ 点伤害，随后令 $x\leftarrow x-1$。

blocks.text: 游戏开始前，Yuki 恰好进行 $k$ 次强化。每次可选择任意满足 $1 \le i \le n$ 的 $i$，令 $v_i$ 增加 $1$；同一张牌可以被多次选择。求敌人受到的最大总伤害。
第一行包含测试数据组数 $T$（$1 \le T \le 10^4$）。对于每组测试数据：

items: 第二行包含 $v_1,v_2,\ldots,v_n$，满足 $1 \le v_i \le 10^9$ 且 $1 \le \sum v_i \le 10^9$。

blocks.text: 保证所有测试数据中 $n$ 的总和不超过 $3\times10^5$。
对于每组测试数据，输出恰好进行 $k$ 次强化后敌人能受到的最大总伤害。
